---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem does this solve? Who benefits? Why is the current behaviour insufficient?

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you'd like to happen. Include API shape, UI mockups, or example config if relevant.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you rejected them.

## Additional context

Links, references, hardware requirements, related issues, anything that helps us understand the request.
